Name: Vineyard Block V1 – 5ha Cabernet Sauvignon (Clone 169, 15yr)
Description: 5 hectares of Cabernet Sauvignon clone 169, VSP trellised, planted 2010. Located on north-facing schist slope. Average yield 8t/ha. Drip irrigated from Berg River allocation. Stellenbosch Estate.

Name: Vineyard Block V2 – 4ha Shiraz (Clone SH9C, 12yr)
Description: 4 hectares of Shiraz clone SH9C, cordon-trained, planted 2013. South-facing granite boulder slope. Average yield 7.5t/ha. Named wine: Boland Estate Shiraz. Vertical tasting stock maintained.

Name: Vineyard Block V3 – 6ha Chenin Blanc (Clone CB1, 20yr)
Description: 6 hectares of old-vine Chenin Blanc clone CB1, bush vines, planted 2005. Unirrigated dryland block on decomposed granite. Average yield 5t/ha. Used for Boland White Blend flagship wine.

Name: Vineyard Block V4 – 3ha Pinotage (Clone P55, 18yr)
Description: 3 hectares of Pinotage clone P55, vertical shoot positioning, planted 2007. Classic red clay Stellenbosch soils. Yield restricted to 6t/ha. Used for single varietal Boland Pinotage wine.

Name: Vineyard Block V5 – 4ha Chardonnay (Clone CY548, 10yr)
Description: 4 hectares of Chardonnay clone CY548, planted 2015 on west-facing slopes. Barrel-fermented Chardonnay production. Average yield 9t/ha. Drip-irrigated with soil-moisture sensors.

Name: Vineyard Block V6 – 3.5ha Merlot (Clone M09, 14yr)
Description: 3.5 hectares of Merlot clone M09, planted 2011. Alluvial clay loam soils on valley floor. Yields 9t/ha. Blending component for Boland Red Blend and standalone Merlot label.

Name: Vineyard Block V7 – 2.5ha Sauvignon Blanc (Clone SAB4, 8yr)
Description: 2.5 hectares of Sauvignon Blanc clone SAB4, planted 2017. Cool south-facing kloofside. Expressive tropical fruit profile. Average yield 10t/ha. Used for Early Harvest Boland Sauvignon Blanc.

Name: Vineyard Block V8 – 2ha Viognier (Clone V78, 9yr)
Description: 2 hectares of Viognier clone V78, planted 2016. Aromatic white variety on warm granite slopes. Low yield 5t/ha by design. Used for luxury single-vineyard Boland Viognier reserve wine.

Name: Boland Estate – Farm Portion 1 (Main Farm, 35ha)
Description: Title Deed for Boland Wine Estate main farm, Portion 1 of Farm 318 Stellenbosch. 35 hectares encompassing Blocks V1–V4 and cellar/winery building complex. SG Diagram No. SG11/2001.
LockedReason: Pledged as collateral – Nedbank Agriculture Farm Bond

Name: Boland Estate – Farm Portion 2 (Upper Slopes, 15ha)
Description: Title Deed for Portion 2 of Farm 318 Stellenbosch. 15 hectares encompassing upper hillside Blocks V5–V8 and dam. SG Diagram No. SG11/2001/02.

Name: New Holland TD5.95 Vineyard Tractor (S/N: NHFDH5016)
Description: 2022 New Holland TD5.95 narrow-body vineyard tractor, 95hp, 4WD, with front linkage and PTO. Used for inter-row spraying, undervine cultivation and harvest bin transport in all vineyard blocks.

Name: Alma Fendt Grape Harvester – 6-Row Mechanical Harvester
Description: Alma harvesting head on Fendt 700 Vario base unit. 6-row shaker harvester for night harvesting of Chardonnay and Chenin Blanc. GPS crop mapping. Capacity: 4 hectares per night shift.

Name: Winery Pneumatic Bladder Press – 8 Tonne Capacity
Description: Bucher Vaslin Delta E8 pneumatic bladder press, 8-tonne capacity. Whole-cluster pressing for premium whites. CIPclean-in-place system. Installed in temperature-controlled crush pad.

Name: Stainless Steel Fermentation Tanks – 24 Tanks (200–500hL)
Description: 24 variable-capacity stainless-steel temperature-controlled fermentation tanks (6 x 200hL, 10 x 350hL, 8 x 500hL). SCADA-controlled cooling jackets. Total capacity: 10,700hL.

Name: French Oak Barrel Maturation Stock – 480 Barrels
Description: 480 x 225L French oak barrels for premium red wine maturation. Mixture of Taransaud (50%), Seguin Moreau (30%) and Dargaud & Jaegle (20%). Mix of new (25%), 2nd fill (40%), 3rd fill (35%).

Name: Netafim Drip Irrigation System – 30ha Vineyard Coverage
Description: Complete Netafim drip irrigation installation, covering all 30 vineyard hectares. Pressure-compensated drippers, fertigation system, soil-moisture tensiometers and automated zone control. Flow: 120m³/hr.

Name: 2026 Vintage Cabernet Sauvignon – 5ha Standing Grapes (Block V1)
Description: Standing grape crop for 2026 vintage season, Block V1 Cabernet Sauvignon. Currently at veraison/colour change stage. Estimated yield 40 tonnes. Pre-sold 50% to Spier Wine Farm under forward agreement.

Name: 2026 Vintage Chenin Blanc – 6ha Old Vines Standing (Block V3)
Description: Standing old-vine Chenin Blanc crop for 2026 vintage. Block V3 dryland bush vines, currently at bunch closure stage. Estimated yield 30 tonnes. Committed to Raats Family Wines reserve winemaker.

Name: 2026 Vintage Chardonnay – 4ha Standing (Block V5)
Description: Standing Chardonnay crop for 2026 vintage, Block V5. Currently at green berry stage under water-stress management. Estimated yield 36 tonnes for barrel fermentation. All committed to estate wine.

Name: Eucalyptus Windbreak Plantation – 3ha (750 Trees)
Description: Eucalyptus cladocalyx windbreak plantation, 3 hectares, 750 trees aged 12 years. Provides frost and southeaster wind protection for all vineyard blocks. Included in Cape Winelands Heritage Register.

Name: Fynbos Conservation Area – 5ha Renosterveld & Fynbos
Description: 5-hectare fynbos and renosterveld conservation area on upper farm slopes. Enrolled in CapeNature Stewardship Programme. Provides pollinator habitat. Biodiversity scoring contributes to WWF Wine Programme certification.

Name: Berg River Water Use License – 350,000 m³/annum
Description: DWS Water Use License (WUL) Ref: 19/C23C/ABC/2501. Authorised abstraction of 350,000 m³/annum from Berg River for vineyard irrigation. Schedule 2 license, valid 40 years from 2005.

Name: Boland Fynbos Honey Apiary – 120 Langstroth Hives
Description: 120 Langstroth hives on fynbos conservation area periphery. Apis mellifera capensis (Cape bee) colonies. Produces award-winning Boland Fynbos Honey (Gold Medal SAAAS 2024). Annual yield: 5.4 tonnes.

Name: Boland Olive Grove – 2ha Frantoio & Leccino (280 trees)
Description: 2-hectare olive grove, 140 Frantoio and 140 Leccino trees, planted 2012, 14yr old. Yields 5t/ha olives for estate extra-virgin olive oil production. Gold SA Olive Awards 2023.

Name: Alfa Laval Olive Press – 2-Phase Decanter (5 t/hr)
Description: Alfa Laval 2-phase olive decanter centrifuge, 5 tonne/hr capacity. Installed in estate olive oil cellar. Produces ultra-premium extra-virgin olive oil. Winner EVOOLEUM World Top 100 2024.
